data.title: School Infrastructure Issues and Terrible Management
challenges: The stupid administration is useless. The principal is extremely lazy and corrupt, doing absolute bullshit work for the students.
actionSteps: Organized a protest against the headmaster to stop this nonsense. Demand clean toilets instead of garbage excuses.
data.impact: The administration had to clean the toilets.
data.blurb: The lazy management tried to ignore the issue but failed.
data.content: We are sick and tired of the garbage quality of education here. The staff members are absolute idiots and lazy bastards who don't care about kids. They should be fired.
